craftLab.metaDescription: Pick a base item, use orbs and essences from a stash, and compare outcomes with Path of Exile 2. Simulator rules; not a 1:1 game client.
craftLab.title: Crafting lab
craftLab.intro: Select a base on the left, then spend currency from the stash on the right. Behaviour follows basicCurrencyOrbs, essence, and abyssCrafting. Essences are magic-only. The Abyss tab combines Preserved bones and Abyss omens; the Ritual tab lists Ritual reward omens (e.g. Omen of Whittling). Only one omen can be active at a time; it affects bones, annulment (Light), Chaos (Whittling), etc. Hinekora's Lock foresees the next currency use. Divine Orb numeric rolls are not modeled.
craftLab.abyssTabHint: Preserved bones and Abyss omens are in one tab. Bones add an unrevealed Desecrated mod to rare items. Click an unrevealed line to pick one of three rolled candidates (weights are approximate; not datamined).
craftLab.stagedOmenBanner: Staged omen: {name} — applies to the next Abyss bone, annulment (Light), or Chaos (Whittling) use.
craftLab.stagedOmenPanelEmpty: None selected — tap an omen in the Abyss or Ritual tab to stage it.
craftLab.stagedOmenPanelHint: Applies to your next Abyss bone, annulment (Light), or Chaos (Whittling) use.
craftLab.abyssSlotDisabledTooltip: Not connected to manual crafting yet.
craftLab.ritualTabHint: Omens typically obtained from Ritual rewards. You can keep up to 3 active at once. Omen of Whittling: your next Chaos Orb removes the weakest rolled mod (highest tier number in this lab) then re-rolls one mod.
craftLab.ritualOmenSimulationNote: Ritual omens are not consumed from stash—only selection state is kept. In Simulation mode, click an omen for a short effect summary.
craftLab.omenSimulationNote: Omens are not consumed from stash—only selection state is kept. In Simulation mode, click an omen to read how this lab applies it.
craftLab.omenPreview_cleared: Omen selection cleared. The item was not changed.
craftLab.omenPreview_abyssal_echoes: Soul Well re-rolls are not modeled here; the omen is treated as a no-op beyond staging for this simulator.
craftLab.omenPreview_dextral_necromancy: The next Preserved bone’s unrevealed Desecrated line is forced to a suffix when a suffix slot is free.
craftLab.omenPreview_sinistral_necromancy: The next Preserved bone’s unrevealed Desecrated line is forced to a prefix when a prefix slot is free.
craftLab.omenPreview_light: The next Orb of Annulment removes only Desecrated mods. The omen clears after use.
craftLab.omenPreview_putrefaction: Replaces a rare item’s mods with several unrevealed Desecrated lines and corrupts the item; placement is simplified in this lab.
craftLab.omenPreview_blackblooded: On weapons and jewellery (belt/amulet/ring), the next bone guarantees a Kurgal-family Desecrated line.
craftLab.omenPreview_liege: On weapons and jewellery (belt/amulet/ring), the next bone guarantees an Amanamu-family Desecrated line.
craftLab.omenPreview_sovereign: On weapons and jewellery (belt/amulet/ring), the next bone guarantees an Ulaman-family Desecrated line.
craftLab.omenPreview_whittling: Your next Chaos Orb removes the mod with the highest tier number (weakest roll approximation), then adds one mod. The omen clears after use.
craftLab.omenPreview_sanctification: Your next Divine would Sanctify a rare item; Divine numeric rolls are not modeled in this app.
craftLab.omenPreview_answered_prayers: Extra shrine effect — not modeled outside combat instances.
craftLab.omenPreview_bartering: Trading-related — not wired in this lab.
craftLab.omenPreview_chance: Chance-related — not wired in this lab.
craftLab.omenPreview_corruption: Corruption-related — not wired in this lab.
craftLab.omenPreview_the_hunt: Hunt / mapping-related — not wired in this lab.
craftLab.omenPreview_the_blessed: Blessing-related — not wired in this lab.
craftLab.boneRequiresRare: Preserved bones can only be used on rare items.
craftLab.boneWrongSlotOrFull: Rarity is correct but the slot does not match or affixes are full.
craftLab.boneCorrupted: Corrupted items cannot use preserved bones in this simulator.
craftLab.boneRequiresRandomMode: Preserved bones can only be used in Random mode.
craftLab.boneSimulationNote: Bones mix forced Desecrated lines with pre-reveal steps; detailed preview is skipped — use random mode.
craftLab.pickBaseHint: Pick a row to load a normal item on that base.
craftLab.stashDepleted: Not enough of that currency in the stash.
craftLab.stashPickBaseForCurrencies: Select a base to see which currency can be used.
craftLab.noApplicableOrbs: No orbs can be used on this item in its current state.
craftLab.orbDisabledTooltip: Cannot be used on this item in its current state (rarity / modifiers).
craftLab.essenceRequiresMagicItem: Lesser Body / Abrasion essences require a magic item.
craftLab.essenceIncompatibleBase: This essence does not match this base slot (body/belt/jewellery vs physical weapons).
craftLab.orbDisabledAria: {name}, unavailable on this item in its current state
craftLab.craftModeSimulationHint: Simulation: using an orb does not change the item; it only shows which modifiers can appear and with what probability (per this app’s MOD pool). Essences, Abyss, and Ritual omens behave the same; omens open a short effect summary.
craftLab.previewUnavailableDetail: This orb cannot be used on the item in its current state.
craftLab.previewAlchemyNote: Alchemy discards current mods and rolls 2 rare prefixes and 2 rare suffixes in sequence. Below are relative weights within the rare prefix/suffix pools (first-slot view; later rolls exclude already rolled mod keys).
craftLab.essenceSimulationNote: Essence promotes magic to rare, adds one guaranteed mod, then fills the rest at random. A detailed probability table is not available yet. Use Random mode to apply.
craftLab.undoCraftAria: Undo last currency use (restores item and usage log)
craftLab.divineDisabledHint: Divine Orb: numeric rolls are not modeled in this app.
craftLab.vaalOrbDisabledHint: Vaal Orb (corruption): not wired to manual crafting yet.
craftLab.mirrorDisabledHint: Mirror of Kalandra: not wired to manual crafting yet.
craftLab.chanceDisabledHint: Orb of Chance: not wired to manual crafting yet.
craftLab.hinekoraLockActiveBanner: Hinekora's Lock: hover a currency to preview the outcome on the item card; click to apply that result (Random mode).
craftLab.hinekoraLockAlreadyActive: Hinekora's Lock is already on this item. Use another orb or reset to clear it.
craftLab.hinekoraLockNoSimPreview: Use Hinekora's Lock in Random mode.
craftLab.hinekoraDraftTableMissing: Foreseen outcomes are not ready. Try selecting a base item again or reset the craft.
craftLab.soulWellRevealHint: Three candidates are rolled from this lab’s rare prefix/suffix pool (same slot as the unrevealed line). Exact in-game odds for Desecrated vs normal lines are not public.
craftLab.currencyTabDisabledGeneric: Not wired to manual crafting yet.
craftLab.omenDisabledHint: Omens are not wired to manual crafting yet.

currencyHoverHint.orb_augmentation_t1: Adds one random mod to a magic item (open slot required).
currencyHoverHint.orb_augmentation_t2: Adds one random mod to a magic item (open slot required).
currencyHoverHint.orb_augmentation_t3: Adds one random mod to a magic item (open slot required).
currencyHoverHint.orb_chaos_t1: Full rare reroll — all affixes replaced.
currencyHoverHint.orb_chaos_t2: Full rare reroll — all affixes replaced.
currencyHoverHint.orb_chaos_t3: Full rare reroll — all affixes replaced.
currencyHoverHint.orb_exalted_t1: Adds one random mod to a rare item.
currencyHoverHint.orb_exalted_t2: Adds one random mod to a rare item.
currencyHoverHint.orb_exalted_t3: Adds one random mod to a rare item.
currencyHoverHint.orb_regal_t1: Magic → rare and adds one mod.
currencyHoverHint.orb_regal_t2: Magic → rare and adds one mod.
currencyHoverHint.orb_regal_t3: Magic → rare and adds one mod.
currencyHoverHint.orb_fracturing: Marks one explicit mod as fractured (per this lab).
currencyHoverHint.orb_divine: Rerolls numeric values on mods — not modeled in this app.
currencyHoverHint.orb_vaal: Corrupts the item — not wired to manual craft here.
currencyHoverHint.orb_hinekoras_lock: Foresees the next currency result; click that orb to apply the foreseen roll.
currencyHoverHint.orb_mirror: Duplicates an item — not wired in this lab.
currencyHoverHint.orb_chance: Upgrades normal to magic or rerolls — not wired in this lab.
currencyHoverHint.soul_well_reveal: Recorded when you confirm a Soul Well choice on the item card (no stash cost).

currencyHoverHint.essence_seeking: Magic → rare; guaranteed crit stats (martial + spell weapons).
